reviewMetadata: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2025
reviewText: I bought this after burning through two prettier cords that started splitting near the plug in a month. This one has been stuffed in my commute bag, bent around a battery pack, and loaned to coworkers with no fray yet. Charges my phone and tablet fast, and the little tie keeps my desk less messy.

reviewText: What stood out is the strain relief by the connector. Most cables in this price range get soft there and then the outer jacket opens up. This one still looks normal after daily use in the car. I honestly wish more brands used this kind of reinforcement.

reviewText: The braid felt a bit firm on day one, but after a week it relaxed and still feels tougher than the premium cable I replaced. No disconnects, no peeling, no weird hot spots. For the money it's one of the smarter buys I've made lately.

reviewText: My old metallic cable looked fancy but the sleeve started fuzzing almost immediately. This cord is plainer, yet the ends are much better protected. Been using it with a power bank every day and it still charges like new. Packaging was simple but I'm fine with that.

reviewText: Meal prep usually destroys container lids before the glass gives out. These have been going to work, the dishwasher, and back into the fridge over and over, and the tabs still close with a strong click. That durability is the whole reason I kept the set.
